description: The XT series motors give you off-the-shelf features that help your severe duty applications perform safely and reliably in harsh chemical, oil and gas, and wastewater environments.
differentiators: Robust cast iron frame construction with laser-etched nameplate
Division 2, Class I, Groups A,B,C,D markings on nameplate
Compatible with ABB Ability® smart sensor for condition monitoring

description: The SIMOTICS SD200 low-voltage NEMA motor from Siemens combines flexibility, performance and efficiency for demanding applications. Built for the harshest industries including oil and gas, petrochemical, and mining.
differentiators: Exceeds NEMA Premium® and DoE efficiency standards
Bi-directional fan and field-modifiable terminal box (switch between F1 and F2 without removing rotor)
Versatile footing works for nearly any retrofit

description: Specially designed for use in aggressive environments such as those found in the Petrochemical Industry, Process Plants, Pulp and Paper and Steel Mills. Complies as standard with the IE3 efficiency level.
differentiators: Exclusive W-Seal 364T and larger provides superior bearing protection
Exclusive WEG painting system exceed 200hrs ASTM 117 corrosion test
Premium Efficiency IE3 according to IEC 60034-30-1

specifications.certification: Certified Class I Div 2, Groups A, B, C & D; Class II, Div 2, Groups F & G
